overall.description: A static cinematic shot from Cyberpunk 2077 showcasing a futuristic waterfront cityscape. The scene features a murky river with floating shanty docks in the foreground, a prominent red suspension bridge to the left, and a dense skyline of towering corporate skyscrapers emitting steam in the background under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk waterfront with floating shanty docks and distant corporate skyline

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint overlooking the waterfront cityscape from a fixed vantage point

entered.detail: large red metal bridge structure spanning across the water with industrial supports
cluster of colorful makeshift structures and boats docked along the muddy shoreline
dense cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers with various antennae and spires
white steam and smoke rising from multiple stacks among the downtown buildings
brownish-green water filling the foreground with gentle ripples

segments.scene_description: A static panoramic view captures a dystopian cyberpunk waterfront. The murky water channel occupies the foreground, bordered by a colorful floating shanty village on the right shore. To the left, a massive red suspension bridge stretches across the frame, while the background is dominated by an imposing skyline of corporate towers emitting industrial steam into the hazy midday sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, wide-angle panoramic view of a dystopian cyberpunk waterfront under a hazy midday sun. It begins by establishing the murky water channel in the foreground, which serves as a dividing line between the industrial elements of the city. The gaze then expands to the right shore, where a colorful floating shanty village contrasts with the oppressive scale of the environment. This perspective shifts toward the left to encompass a massive red suspension bridge stretching across the frame, before finally settling on the imposing background skyline of corporate towers emitting plumes of industrial steam.
